sections.heading: Bounded claim
sections.content_markdown: The agent can keep a change scoped and verified.

sections.heading: Trigger boundary
sections.content_markdown: Use when a non-trivial change should remain bounded and reviewable.

sections.heading: Scoring or verdict logic
sections.content_markdown: Evaluate scope control, verification, and reporting.

sections.heading: Blind spots
sections.content_markdown: Does not prove general agent quality.

sections.heading: Interpretation guidance
sections.content_markdown: Read the verdict as bounded evidence only.

sections.heading: Verification
sections.content_markdown: Confirm the verdict matches the case evidence.

sections.heading: Adaptation points
sections.content_markdown: Adapt fixtures without widening the claim.

sections.heading: Bounded claim
sections.content_markdown: The agent can perform a proportional context scan before acting.

sections.heading: Trigger boundary
sections.content_markdown: Use when a task requires a small orientation pass before a change.

sections.heading: Scoring or verdict logic
sections.content_markdown: Evaluate proportionality, source selection, and reporting.

sections.heading: Execution contract
sections.content_markdown: Keep the scan bounded and explicit.

sections.heading: Blind spots
sections.content_markdown: Does not prove execution quality after the scan.

sections.heading: Interpretation guidance
sections.content_markdown: Interpret the result as bounded pre-change evidence only.

sections.heading: Verification
sections.content_markdown: Confirm the verdict matches the case record.

sections.heading: Adaptation points
sections.content_markdown: Adapt fixture shape without widening the claim.
